method.name: deterministic_boundary_acceptance
method.decision_policy: Accept only structurally strong split boundaries with no rejected cross-validation evidence. Retain style-only, merged-title, missing-capture, and view-state-risk boundaries as review items.

parser_observations.message: Boundary decisions are graph-boundary candidates, not the final document graph.
111 boundaries remain review-required because evidence is style-only, title-only, uncaptured, or view-state/quality limited.
